name: Date-Orange Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cut-up dates, soaked in boiling water and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Add boiling water to orange juice to equal 1 cup.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar. Add egg.
4. Add juice alternately with dry ingredients.
5. Add dates and nuts.
6. Bake in a loaf pan, well greased, for 50-60 minutes in a preheated oven at 350°F.
